title: Dense Savory Vietnamese Pork Com Tam
description: A winey and chewy Vietnamese dish featuring granulated sugar and mushimono-steam, served on a salt block. This flexitarian-friendly com tam is perfect for meal prep.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together sugar, fish sauce, soy sauce, rice vinegar, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the pork from the marinade and place it on a salt block.
Steam the pork using a mushimono-steam method for 20 minutes.
While the pork is cooking, prepare the com tam by mixing cooked rice with a small amount of water to achieve the right consistency.
Once the pork is cooked, slice it into thin pieces and serve on top of the com tam.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
